# Chalet du Tornet — full reference

> Lakeside restaurant, bar and terrace at the heart of the Domaine du Tornet, on the shore of Lake La Balme-de-Sillingy (Haute-Savoie, France) — about 20 minutes from Annecy. Generous traditional and Savoyard cuisine, a bar open all day, and a terrace facing the water. Open February to early November. This file is the extended version of /llms.txt.

## Identity & contact

- Name: Chalet du Tornet (restaurant · bar · terrace)
- Address: 161 Route de Paris, 74330 La Balme-de-Sillingy, Haute-Savoie, France
- Coordinates: 45.970952, 6.032109
- Phone: +33 4 38 80 22 51
- Email: chaletdutornet74@gmail.com
- Price range: €€ · Payment: cash and card · Reservations accepted
- Cuisine: French, Savoyard, traditional — local produce
- Season: open February to early November
- Rating: ~4.0 from 600+ reviews

## Language editions

The full site is a standalone page per language; French is the reference and the others are complete translations.

- Français (reference): https://chaletdutornet.com/
- English: https://chaletdutornet.com/en.html
- Deutsch: https://chaletdutornet.com/de.html
- Italiano: https://chaletdutornet.com/it.html
- Nederlands: https://chaletdutornet.com/nl.html
- Español: https://chaletdutornet.com/es.html

Localized machine-readable briefs: /llms-fr.txt, /llms-en.txt, /llms-de.txt, /llms-it.txt, /llms-nl.txt, /llms-es.txt

## Opening hours

Bar service and kitchen have separate hours.

- Monday–Wednesday: Bar 09:00–17:00 · Kitchen 11:45–13:45
- Thursday–Friday: Bar 09:00–23:00 · Kitchen 11:45–13:45 (lunch) and 19:00–21:30 (dinner)
- Saturday: Bar 09:30–23:00 · Kitchen 11:45–14:45 (lunch) and 19:00–21:30 (dinner)
- Sunday: Bar 09:30–17:30 · Kitchen 11:45–14:45

Hours apply during the open season (February to early November). Confirm by phone for holidays and private events.

## Food & drink

- Traditional & Savoyard cuisine with local produce: tartiflette, the "Burger du Tornet", MOF butcher's cut, trout fillet, beef & salmon tartares, prawns (gambas).
- Daily set menu (menu du jour) from €19.90 · also à la carte.
- À la carte examples: Burger du Tornet €22 · MOF butcher's cut €22 · trout fillet €25 · prawns €26 · beef tartare €24 · salmon tartare €25 · duck terrine with foie gras €12.
- Children's menu €13.50: one drink (cordial/lemonade/diabolo/cola/juice) · beef patty, nuggets, ham or trout · fries, vegetable tian, potato, crispy rice or tartiflette · 1 scoop of ice cream, compote or faisselle.
- Bar from morning to the last drink: coffees, local spirits, lemonades, and ice cream in the afternoon.
- Group menus and full-venue privatisation available for events.

## The Domaine du Tornet

The Chalet sits inside the Domaine du Tornet — about 7 hectares of free-access nature owned and managed by the commune of La Balme-de-Sillingy (the Chalet welcomes visitors there but does not own the park). Features:

- The lake (7 ha): private fishing lake managed by the Balme Pêche Loisirs association; permit required.
- Pumptrack (280 m): three colour-coded lines for MTB, BMX, skate, rollers, balance bikes, scooters.
- Street workout: structures for strength, gymnastics and freestyle, all levels.
- Fitness area: adult area facing the lake.
- Children's playground: major new playground opened summer 2025, plus a dedicated toddler area.
- Pétanque courts: several, free access (bring your own boules).
- Observation pontoon: wooden deck over the lake, installed 2024.
- Parc des Jardins: Gardens of Haute-Savoie park and the national collection of Asian flowering cherry trees — spectacular in bloom (March–April).
- Camping-car area: 22 pitches (a 23rd being added), direct walking access to the lake and the Chalet.
- E-bike rental: on site — ideal for reaching Annecy via the "La Belle Via" greenway.
- Free parking: large car park renewed late 2025, EV charging points, bus parking.
- Picnic tables and relaxation furniture around the lake.

## Getting there

- ~20 minutes from Annecy · in La Balme-de-Sillingy, Haute-Savoie.
- Bike access via the greenway (voie verte / La Belle Via).
- Free parking on site; wheelchair access (PMR).
